EmailTemplate.name: AES - New Reference Request
EmailTemplate.subject: We need one more reference to keep things moving.
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
ONE MORE REFERENCE NEEDED.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We’re currently reviewing your references as part of your application with Alliance Extra Staff, and we need one more to complete the process.
This could be because:
Your referee hasn’t responded or declined the request Their contact details weren’t valid Or the reference didn’t fully meet the role’s requirements
To help us move things along, head over to the portal and add the contact details of another referee who can confirm your recent work history.
SUBMIT NEW REFERENCE
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
